phase: Phase 5 — distribution, slim skill, client registration, docs
surface: package (npx bundle + full ci) + api (registration renderer)

commands.note: dist/server.mjs 988KB, single shebang line 1, cloakbrowser external+dynamic, no inlined source
dist server handshakes and lists 15 tools (npx-able)
validate + lint(0 errors) + format + test(e2e 5 + engine 374) + engine:validate + mcp:test(45) all green, exit 0

adversarialCases.scenario: bundled dist had two shebangs (source + banner) -> invalid ESM start
adversarialCases.expected: single shebang on line 1; dist server starts and handshakes
adversarialCases.evidence: removed source shebang; dist handshakes 15 tools

adversarialCases.scenario: render registration for an unsupported client
pre-existing lint errors (no-control-regex, no-unused-expressions) blocked ci
adversarialCases.expected: behavior-preserving fixes -> lint exit 0 -> full ci green
adversarialCases.evidence: npm run ci exit 0; validateRelativeModulePath ASCII behavior preserved

adversarialCases.scenario: edit SKILL.md without mirroring to all 4 skill roots
adversarialCases.expected: validate fails closed on mirror drift until parity restored
adversarialCases.evidence: SKILL.md live-surface section mirrored to skills/.claude/.agents/plugins; validate exit 0

deliverables.distribution: mcp/ npx-able: esbuild bundle externalizes cloakbrowser/playwright-core and preserves the runtime dynamic import; bin -> dist/server.mjs with a valid shebang.
deliverables.registration: mcp/src/register.mjs renders single-stdio-server registration for all 8 targets (direct, codex, json, claude-code, gajae-code, openclaw, hermes, hermes-agent), mirroring engine/mcp-config.mjs shapes.
deliverables.skill: SKILL.md gains a primary Live-surface section routing to hyper-cloaking-mcp with tool order + guardrail/consent narrative; cli.mjs live explicitly RETAINED (not deprecated). Additive routing section (full engine-glue prose removal is a follow-up).
deliverables.ci: npm run ci wired to include mcp:test (45 mcp tests) and is fully green.

regressions: none — full ci green including e2e(5), engine(374), mcp(45); pre-existing lint fixes preserve behavior.
